title: tax — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — rate + jurisdiction + provider CRUD by owner + admin + finance role; calculation + exemption reads by owner + admin + finance role + support role; exemption verify/reject by admin + owner + compliance role. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant support tooling for ops + support cross-tenant P1 review. All tenant-plane permissions carry the `tax.` prefix (or `platform.tax.` on the platform audience) per hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: tax.rates.update
permissions.description: Restricted — mutating a rate that has been referenced by any tax_calculation is refused at the observer layer (calculation-freeze).

permissions.name: tax.rates.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete only. Hard-delete refused (rates retain indefinitely for audit).

permissions.name: tax.rates.sync
permissions.description: Trigger on-demand SyncTaxRatesFromProviderJob. Weekly cron; this permission is for admin-initiated runs (post-fiscal-year rate change).

permissions.name: tax.exemptions.view
permissions.description: certificate_number + certificate_document_url returned redacted for support role. Full view: admin + owner + compliance.

permissions.name: tax.exemptions.create
permissions.description: Any authenticated user can request an exemption for their own customer record. Admin + owner + finance can create for any customer in the tenant.

permissions.name: tax.exemptions.verify
permissions.description: Manual exemption verification. Reviews the certificate + transitions verification_status to 'verified'.

permissions.name: tax.exemptions.reject
permissions.description: Manual exemption rejection. Requires a reason.

permissions.name: tax.calculations.preview
permissions.description: Real-time preview via POST /calculate (does NOT persist). Used by cart pages + pricing widgets.

permissions.name: tax.providers.view
permissions.description: config field returned encrypted; support role sees redacted view.

permissions.name: tax.providers.test
permissions.description: Send a synthetic test calculation via the provider's sandbox endpoint.

permissions.name: tax.providers.reset-circuit-breaker
permissions.description: Manually reset an OPEN circuit-breaker. Every reset writes an audit row.

permissions.name: tax.reports.annual.view
permissions.description: Access the annual tax summary. Requires `tax_annual_report` entitlement.

permissions.name: platform.tax.rates.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant view of tax rates + platform-reference jurisdictions.
